en.name: Ace & Newgate
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may reveal 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Draw 1 card and place the revealed card at the top of your deck.

jp.name: ニューゲート＆エース
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の手札から『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つカード1枚を公開することができる：カード1枚を引き、公開したカードをデッキの上に置く。

definition.name: Ace & Newgate
definition.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may reveal 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Draw 1 card and place the revealed card at the top of your deck.

en.name: Izo
en.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" other than [Izo] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash this Character: Draw 1 card and place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

jp.name: イゾウ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、「イゾウ」以外の『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。【相手のアタック時】このキャラをトラッシュに置くことができる：カード1枚を引き、自分の手札1枚をデッキの下に置く。

definition.name: Izo
definition.text: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" other than [Izo] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash this Character: Draw 1 card and place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

en.name: Edward.Newgate
en.effectText: [Double Attack] (This card deals 2 damage.)[On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards.

jp.name: エドワード・ニューゲート
jp.effectText: 【ダブルアタック】(このカードが与えるダメージは2になる)【登場時】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、カード2枚を引く。

definition.name: Edward.Newgate
definition.text: [Double Attack] (This card deals 2 damage.)[On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards.

en.name: Kouzuki Oden
en.effectText: If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash 2 cards from your hand instead.[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards and return 1 of your Characters other than this Character to the owner's hand: Set this Character as active.

jp.name: 光月おでん
jp.effectText: このキャラが相手の効果で場を離れる場合、代わりに自分の手札2枚を捨てることができる。【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分のドン‼3枚をレストにし、このキャラ以外の自分のキャラ1枚を持ち主の手札に戻すことができる：このキャラをアクティブにする。

definition.name: Kouzuki Oden
definition.text: If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash 2 cards from your hand instead.[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards and return 1 of your Characters other than this Character to the owner's hand: Set this Character as active.

en.name: Jozu
en.effectText: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.

jp.name: ジョズ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、カード2枚を引き、自分の手札1枚を捨てる。

definition.name: Jozu
definition.text: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.

en.name: Squard
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

jp.name: スクアード
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚にレストのドン!!1枚までを、付与する。

definition.name: Squard
definition.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

en.name: Vista
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

jp.name: ビスタ
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)

definition.name: Vista
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

jp.name: ポートガス・Ｄ・エース

en.name: Whitey Bay
en.effectText: [Your Turn] [On Play] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" gains +2000 power during this turn.

jp.name: ホワイティベイ
jp.effectText: 【自分のターン中】【登場時】自分の手札から『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つカード2枚を公開することができる：自分の『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つリーダー1枚までを、このターン中、パワー+2000。

definition.name: Whitey Bay
definition.text: [Your Turn] [On Play] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" gains +2000 power during this turn.

en.name: Marco
en.effectText: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead.[When Attacking] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

jp.name: マルコ
jp.effectText: 【ターン1回】このキャラが相手の効果でKOされる場合、代わりに自分の手札1枚を捨てることができる。【アタック時】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、このキャラは、次の相手のターン終了時まで、パワー+1000。

definition.name: Marco
definition.text: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead.[When Attacking] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

en.name: I Am Whitebeard!!
en.effectText: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", play up to 1 [Edward.Newgate] from your hand. Then, you may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

jp.name: おれァ‘‘白ひげ‘‘だァア!!!!
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のリーダーが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、自分の手札から「エドワード・ニューゲート」1枚までを、登場させる。その後、自分のライフの上か下から1枚を手札に加えてもよい。そうした場合、自分のリーダー1枚までを、次の相手のターン終了時まで、パワー+2000。

definition.name: I Am Whitebeard!!
definition.text: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", play up to 1 [Edward.Newgate] from your hand. Then, you may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

en.name: Take That Back!! Take Back What You Said!!
en.effectText: [Counter] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] Draw 1 card.

jp.name: 取り消せよ……!!!今の言葉……!!!
jp.effectText: 【カウンター】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、そのカードが『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つ場合、自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このバトル中、パワー＋4000。 【トリガー】カード1枚を引く。

definition.name: Take That Back!! Take Back What You Said!!
definition.text: [Counter] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] Draw 1 card.

en.name: Fire Fist
en.effectText: [Main] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Draw 1 card. Then, place up to 1 Character with a cost of 5 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 3 or less to the owner's hand.

jp.name: 火拳
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分の手札から『白ひげ海賊団』を含む特徴を持つカード2枚を公開することができる：カード1枚を引く。その後、コスト5以下のキャラ1枚までを、持ち主のデッキの下に置く。 【トリガー】コスト3以下のキャラ1枚までを、持ち主の手札に戻す。

definition.name: Fire Fist
definition.text: [Main] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Draw 1 card. Then, place up to 1 Character with a cost of 5 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 3 or less to the owner's hand.
